ogTitle: Jancourt East vs Jarrahmond: Climate Safety

heading: Jancourt East vs Jarrahmond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jancourt East, Victoria and Jarrahmond, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jancourt East has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Jarrahmond (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jancourt East or Jarrahmond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jancourt East has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Jarrahmond scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jancourt East scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Jarrahmond scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jancourt East or Jarrahmond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jancourt East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
